modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to view security camera feeds in Milestone XProtect.

full_description_text: 
The user is attempting to log into the Milestone XProtect Smart Client. They report that there are no views available upon login. This issue is affecting the ability to monitor security camera feeds. The request involves adding a new or existing University Police Officer to the system.
